pages.title: AI Docs Overview
pages.description: Start here for the compact undo/redo contract, retrieval surfaces, and links to the highest-signal AI docs.

pages.title: Public API And README
pages.description: Published entry points and human-facing overview for the package surface that assistants should import from.

pages.title: Provider And Store Semantics
pages.description: Source files that define the multi-scope orchestration, the per-scope store, async + AbortSignal cancellation, and lifecycle hooks.

pages.title: Hooks
pages.description: React hooks that consumers actually call: useAmnesia, useUndoableState, useAmnesiaFocusClaim, useAmnesiaScopes.

pages.title: Devtools And Persistence Bridge
pages.description: Optional surfaces — devtools registry for external introspection and the optional react-mnemonic bridge for persistence-aware state.

pages.title: High-Risk Guides
pages.description: Detailed guidance for the semantics that are easiest for agents to get subtly wrong.
